q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is response.set_cookie() which only modifies an in-memory response object; no network I/O, shell execution, or external side effects occur.

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: The response object with the injected cookie is returned (exprs includes 'response'), allowing inspection of response.cookies after the call.

q3_result_in_memory.evidence: returns.kind is 'value' and returns.exprs includes 'response'; the cookie set via set_cookie is stored on the in-memory response object.
